questions: What is the IAB Content Taxonomy used for?
How does taxonomy support contextual targeting and suitability?
qa.answer: The Content Taxonomy standardizes content categories and attributes to enable interoperable contextual targeting, brand suitability, and reporting across platforms and vendors.
implication: Map publisher content to taxonomy; enforce in SSP/DSP and brand safety tools.
Use taxonomy labels to refine suitability and optimize contextual segments.
Update mappings as taxonomy versions evolve to maintain consistency.
